name: mnb/scraperkit
description: MNB ScraperKit V1.8.0 - professional PHP crawling and data extraction framework with Symfony Console commands, safe crawling, source connectors, exports, reports, profile schemas, queue workers, browser fallback, database storage, scheduling, monitoring, and a safe config-only plugin system.

suggest.ext-curl: Recommended for the cURL HTTP engine. The stream/file_get_contents engine works without cURL when allow_url_fopen is enabled.
suggest.ext-pdo: Needed only for database storage features.
suggest.symfony/panther: Optional browser-assisted crawling adapter for JavaScript-rendered pages. Normal PHP HTTP crawling works without it.
suggest.chrome/chromium: Needed only when using browser-assisted crawling through Panther/Chrome.
suggest.pdo_sqlite: Optional SQLite driver for local database storage.
suggest.pdo_mysql: Optional MySQL/MariaDB driver for server database storage.
